name: pocketbooks-sports
description: PocketBooks Sports — private betting club platform

scripts.verify: node tests/lifecycle.test.js && node tests/run.js && node tests/conflict.test.js && node tests/placement-gate.test.js && node tests/teaser-gate.test.js && node tests/sport-access.test.js && node tests/grading-audit.test.js && node tests/supabase-mirror.test.js && node tests/read-shadow.test.js && node tests/db-primary-read.test.js && echo '✅ All tests passed — safe to deploy'
scripts.predeploy: npm run verify && npm run build
